texto: Whether [new Protestant church movements] place their emphasis on new worship styles, expressions of the Holy Spirit’s power, evangelism to seekers, or Bible teaching, these so-called new movements still operate out of the fallacious assumption that the church belongs firmly in the town square, that is, at the heart of Western culture. And if they begin with this mistaken belief about their position in Western society, all their church planting, all their reproduction will simply mirror this misapprehension.
explicacao: Citação de Alan Hirsch sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Whether [new Protestant church movements] place their emphasis on new worship styles, expressions…” articula amor, christendom, christianity em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como termino e christianity.

texto: Evangelism cant be our focus! We must not stop sharing the good news, but here’s the deal, here’s the wonderful thing, it gets done along the way as you do discipleship. Great commission is just about going to disciple the nations and you know what happens... as you disciple them evangelism takes place, because it’s done in the context of discipleship.Here’s the issue: We have to reframe evangelism within the context of discipleship

texto: If we're going to impact our world in the name of Jesus, it will be because people like you and me took action in the power of the Spirit. Ever since the mission and ministry of Jesus, God has never stopped calling for a movement of "Little Jesuses" to follow him into the world and unleash the remarkable redemptive genius that lies in the very message we carry. Given the situation of the Church in the West, much will now depend on whether we are willing to break out of a stifling herd instinct and find God again in the context of the advancing kingdom of God.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Alan Hirsch: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “If we're going to impact our world in the name of Jesus, it will be because people like you and m…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, church, impact pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e impact.
